skills.name: Price Snapshot
skills.description: Fetches spot last price and 24h range for one trading pair.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Top Movers Radar
skills.description: Ranks strongest gainers by quote asset with optional liquidity filter.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Kline Brief
skills.description: Summarizes recent candles and short-term trend percentage.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Symbol Status
skills.description: Checks trading status, base/quote assets, and core filters for one symbol.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Funding Watch
skills.description: Reads current funding rate and next funding time from Binance Futures.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Open Interest Scan
skills.description: Tracks futures open interest snapshot for one symbol (launch backlog mode).
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: BSC RPC Fanout Check
skills.description: Validates multi-endpoint RPC consistency for BSC (launch backlog mode).
skills.author: skillshub

openSourceCandidates.name: Market Data Module
openSourceCandidates.adaptation: Data read-only module for fast launch.
